# yoga

```go
import "github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/yoga"
```

Package yoga identifies Vedic planetary combinations \(yogas\) that indicate major life themes such as power, wealth, difficulty, and spiritual progress.

Supported yoga categories include Mahapurusha yogas \(Ruchaka, Bhadra, Hamsa, Malavya, Shasha\), Raja yogas, Dhana yogas, and common named yogas like Gajakesari, Budhaditya, and Chandra\-Mangala.

<a name="YogaAnalysis"></a>
## type [YogaAnalysis](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/yoga/yoga.go#L33-L35>)

YogaAnalysis holds all detected yogas.

```go
type YogaAnalysis struct {
    Yogas []YogaResult `json:"yogas"`
}
```

<a name="AnalyzeYogas"></a>
### func [AnalyzeYogas](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/yoga/yoga.go#L369>)

```go
func AnalyzeYogas(positions []vedic.SiderealPosition, houses []float64, siderealASC float64) *YogaAnalysis
```

AnalyzeYogas detects Vedic yogas from sidereal positions and house cusps. The houses parameter is not currently used \(whole\-sign houses are derived from siderealASC\), but is accepted for future compatibility with quadrant\-based house systems.

<a name="YogaCategory"></a>
## type [YogaCategory](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/yoga/yoga.go#L12>)

YogaCategory classifies a yoga by its life\-theme.

```go
type YogaCategory string
```

<a name="YogaRaja"></a>

```go
const (
    YogaRaja        YogaCategory = "RAJA"        // Power, authority
    YogaDhana       YogaCategory = "DHANA"       // Wealth
    YogaArishta     YogaCategory = "ARISHTA"     // Difficulty
    YogaMahapurusha YogaCategory = "MAHAPURUSHA" // Great person
    YogaNabhasa     YogaCategory = "NABHASA"     // Pattern-based
    YogaOther       YogaCategory = "OTHER"
)
```

<a name="YogaResult"></a>
## type [YogaResult](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/yoga/yoga.go#L24-L30>)

YogaResult describes a single detected yoga.

```go
type YogaResult struct {
    Name        string            `json:"name"`
    Category    YogaCategory      `json:"category"`
    Description string            `json:"description"`
    Planets     []models.PlanetID `json:"planets_involved"`
    Strength    string            `json:"strength"` // "strong", "moderate", "weak"
}
```
